overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character with pink hair running through Night City's urban downtown at dusk. The scene transitions from a third-person follow along a sidewalk past digital billboards to a neon-lit plaza featuring the 'Bohemia' club, with the camera continuing through the environment in first-person perspective after the character exits the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city sidewalk with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: running along elevated sidewalk past digital billboards and traffic

notable_agents.action: player character with pink hair running ahead along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large rotating digital screens displaying advertisements on the left side of the walkway
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings towering in the background
metal safety barrier separating the sidewalk from the street below

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person follow camera running along an elevated city sidewalk at dusk. Digital billboards line the left side displaying various advertisements, while a metal railing separates the walkway from the street traffic below. The player character with pink hair runs ahead toward the distant glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with neon club signage

events.description: character turns right off the sidewalk into the open plaza area
followed character exits frame to the right, camera continues forward in first-person perspective

agents.ego_description: turning into the plaza and continuing forward as the followed character veers off and exits the frame to the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing still and looking at a tablet device

entered.detail: large bright pink neon sign reading 'BOHEMIA' with heart symbols on the building facade
single palm tree growing in the plaza center
multi-story building with illuminated windows and ground floor shops

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into an open plaza, leaving the sidewalk behind. The bright pink neon 'BOHEMIA' sign becomes visible on the right side of the frame. A pedestrian stands on the left looking at a tablet. At the end of the segment, the followed character exits the frame to the right while the camera continues moving forward through the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit plaza with advertising pillars approaching club entrance

events.description: camera transitions to first-person perspective, continuing through plaza without the followed character

agents.ego_description: moving through the plaza toward the Bohemia club, observing the neon signage and rotating advertising pillars

entered.detail: tall pillars with multiple digital screens rotating around a central axis displaying various advertisements
metal and concrete benches arranged in rows on the plaza ground

segments.scene_description: Now in first-person perspective, the camera moves through the open plaza toward the Bohemia club. The pink neon sign grows larger on the right. Rotating digital advertising pillars and benches populate the center of the plaza. The environment is illuminated by artificial neon lighting against the darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: club entrance area with rotating digital advertisements

events.description: camera circles around the rotating advertising pillars showing different angles of the displays

agents.ego_description: circling the advertising pillars near the Bohemia club entrance, examining the neon signage and digital displays from multiple angles

entered.detail: ground floor entrance to the Bohemia club with large glass doors and pink neon framing

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the Bohemia club entrance, moving around the rotating advertising pillars in the foreground. The pink neon signage illuminates the right side of the frame, casting colored light on the paved ground. The camera circles the pillars, showing different angles of the digital displays before the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a third-person chase along a city sidewalk into a first-person exploration of a neon-lit plaza. It begins by following a pink-haired character running past digital billboards and metal railings toward distant glass skyscrapers under a dusk sky. As the character turns right, the scene opens into a wide plaza where a bright pink Bohemia sign emerges on the right and a pedestrian stands nearby, before the character exits the frame and the perspective shifts to first-person. The camera then pushes forward through the plaza, passing rotating advertising pillars and benches illuminated by artificial neon lights against the darkening atmosphere. Finally, the movement circles the digital displays and approaches the entrance of the Bohemia club, with the pink signage casting a vivid glow across the paved ground.
